name: FLORENTINE BRAINROT #22
description: Florentine Brainrot #22 is a nokia basilica single-panel relic built around Botticelli and Forum Signature Baroque. Tarocchi Fiorentini assigns Giustizia, used here as the witness card. Botticelli left a receipt where the Proof-of-Work Relic Auction should have been. The notary marks it suspicious but lets it hang. The generated insert — a marble hand emerging from a phone screen with a seed phrase receipt — acts as the modern clue; Gematria marks MEDICI at Σ 258.

artwork_breakdown.generated_insert: a marble hand emerging from a phone screen with a seed phrase receipt

tarocchi_fiorentini.allocation_rule: 14 complete 97-card sets across 1,401 tokens, plus 43 deterministic extras

artwork_breakdown.composition_read: Botticelli anchors the historical source. Giustizia supplies the witness logic. a marble hand emerging from a phone screen with a seed phrase receipt acts as the modern meme-object. The nokia basilica palette and Forum Signature Baroque styling make the panel read like a corrupted Renaissance case file.

brainrot_explanation.plain_english: Read plainly: Botticelli is treated as evidence in mirror court minutes. The old-world clue is a convent recipe book with angelic checksum errors; the modern-world echo is a rent-free relic saved in browser history. The joke is that Renaissance patronage, holy paperwork, and today's marketplace/status feed are the same machine wearing different costumes.
brainrot_explanation.read_between_the_lines: The Giustizia card is not decorative; it is the witness that tells you how to read the room. Botticelli left a receipt where the Proof-of-Work Relic Auction should have been. The notary marks it suspicious but lets it hang. The slang is a translation layer: sacred authority becomes aura, patronage becomes Fanum-tax economics, and marginalia becomes groupchat evidence.

hidden_solution.method: Split the visible marker into DNA triplets, translate each triplet through the genetic-code table, then read the amino-acid letters as the source Base name. Non-standard letters use documented stop/nearest triplet placeholders.

hidden_acrostic.method: Read the first character of each acrostic line; slashes are spaces.

collector_warnings: Do not cite the notary after midnight.
Do not let the codon marker breed near the provenance strip.
If the Tarocchi card and QR code disagree, trust the card.
If the ledger balances, something has gone terribly wrong.
Giustizia is a witness, not a decorative rectangle.
